node.text: Calvin is excited to explore Shibuya Crossing and Shinjuku in Tokyo and is looking forward to trying the amazing food there.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 7 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Calvin is planning to visit Tokyo next month after the tour ends and wishes sometimes to go back to places similar to those in the shared photos.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Calvin performed in Tokyo during a concert and felt the energy of the crowd was nuts.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 5 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Calvin met with incredible artists in Boston and is excited to collaborate with them on new music.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Calvin has never tried ramen but is planning to try it while in Tokyo.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 8 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Calvin is interested in checking out Dave's garage and the awesome cars he has worked on.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Calvin started touring with Frank Ocean, which started in August last year after they met at a festival.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Calvin admires Dave for his work on restoring and modifying the car, calling it a masterpiece.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: Calvin went to a networking event to meet more artists to build up his fan base.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "located") OR atom(content =~ "location") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.89)

node.text: Calvin encourages Dave to keep working hard and living his best life, appreciating his progress.
